mapper.select: /* selectAdmin501SurveyQstList */ SELECT q.srvy_qitem_oid, q.srvy_oid, q.up_srvy_qitem_oid, q.srvy_qitem_seq , q.srvy_qitem_ttl, q.srvy_qitem_type, q.esntl_yn, q.plrl_chc_yn , q.lmt_yn, q.etc_add_yn, q.likert_min, q.likert_max , q.likert_min_lbl, q.likert_max_lbl, q.srvy_qitem_lmt , q.reg_id, q.mdfcn_id, CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NOT NULL THEN 1 WHEN p.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS level, CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN CONCAT('CH', q.srvy_qitem_seq) WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(q.srvy_qitem_seq AS CHAR) WHEN p.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND p.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN CAST(q.srvy_qitem_seq AS CHAR) ELSE CONCAT(p.srvy_qitem_seq, '-', q.srvy_qitem_seq) END AS displayQNo, CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN p.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND p.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN CONCAT('CH', p.srvy_qitem_seq) ELSE CAST(p.srvy_qitem_seq AS CHAR) END AS parentDisplayQNo FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem q LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem p ON q.up_srvy_qitem_oid = p.srvy_qitem_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.srvy_qitem gp ON p.up_srvy_qitem_oid = gp.srvy_qitem_oid WHERE q.srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} ORDER BY /* 최상위 그룹핑 (Root Sequence) */ /* 목적: 모든 항목을 '최상위 챕터 또는 독립 문항'의 순번으로 묶음 */ CASE WHEN gp.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN gp.srvy_qitem_seq WHEN p.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN p.srvy_qitem_seq ELSE q.srvy_qitem_seq END ASC, /* 그룹 내 상위 문항 정렬 (Parent Sequence) */ /* 목적: 챕터(Lv.0)를 가장 위로 올리고, 그 다음 Lv.1 문항들을 정렬함 */ CASE WHEN q.up_srvy_qitem_oid IS NULL AND q.srvy_qitem_type IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN gp.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN p.srvy_qitem_seq ELSE q.srvy_qitem_seq END ASC, /* 하위 문항 정렬 (Leaf Sequence) */ /* 목적: 같은 부모 문항을 가진 Lv.2 항목들끼리의 최종 순서를 결정 */ CASE WHEN gp.srvy_qitem_oid IS NOT NULL THEN q.srvy_qitem_seq ELSE 0 END ASC
mapper.insert: /* insertQuestionCopy */ INSERT INTO ${schema}.srvy_qitem ( srvy_oid , up_srvy_qitem_oid, srvy_qitem_seq, srvy_qitem_ttl , srvy_qitem_type, esntl_yn, plrl_chc_yn, lmt_yn , srvy_qitem_lmt, etc_add_yn , likert_min, likert_max, likert_min_lbl, likert_max_lbl , reg_id, reg_dt ) SELECT #{newSrvyOid} , up_srvy_qitem_oid , srvy_qitem_seq, srvy_qitem_ttl , srvy_qitem_type, esntl_yn, plrl_chc_yn, lmt_yn , srvy_qitem_lmt, etc_add_yn , likert_min, likert_max, likert_min_lbl, likert_max_lbl , #{userId}, NOW() FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem WHERE srvy_oid = #{oldSrvyOid} ORDER BY srvy_qitem_oid

/* insertOptionCopy */ INSERT INTO ${schema}.srvy_qitem_opt ( srvy_qitem_oid, srvy_qitem_opt_seq, srvy_qitem_opt_txt, srvy_qitem_opt_img_file_oid, etc_opt_yn, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{srvyQitemOid}, #{srvyQitemOptSeq}, #{srvyQitemOptTxt}, #{srvyQitemOptImgFileOid}, #{etcOptYn}, #{regId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: /* selectQstList */ SELECT srvy_qitem_oid, up_srvy_qitem_oid FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem WHERE srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} ORDER BY srvy_qitem_oid

/* selectOptList */ SELECT srvy_qitem_opt_oid, srvy_qitem_oid, srvy_qitem_opt_seq, srvy_qitem_opt_txt, srvy_qitem_opt_img_file_oid, etc_opt_yn FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem_opt WHERE srvy_qitem_oid IN ( SELECT srvy_qitem_oid FROM ${schema}.srvy_qitem WHERE srvy_oid = #{srvyOid} ) ORDER BY srvy_qitem_oid, srvy_qitem_opt_seq
mapper.update: /* updateAdmin501SurveyBase */ UPDATE ${schema}.srvy SET srvy_ttl = #{srvyTtl}, srvy_bgng_dt = #{srvyBgngDt}, srvy_end_dt = #{srvyEndDt}, srvy_trgt = #{srvyTrgt}, srvy_type = #{srvyType}, srvy_stts = #{srvyStts}, nm_clct_yn = #{nmClctYn}, gndr_clct_yn = #{gndrClctYn}, inst_clct_yn = #{instClctYn}, mpno_clct_yn = #{mpnoClctYn}, eml_clct_yn = #{emlClctYn}, addr_clct_yn = #{addrClctYn}, srvy_cn = #{srvyCn}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE srvy_oid = #{srvyOid}
mapper.insert: /* upsertAdmin501SurveyQst */ INSERT INTO ${schema}.srvy_qitem ( srvy_qitem_oid, srvy_oid, up_srvy_qitem_oid, srvy_qitem_seq, srvy_qitem_ttl, srvy_qitem_type, esntl_yn, plrl_chc_yn, lmt_yn, srvy_qitem_lmt, etc_add_yn, likert_min, likert_max, likert_min_lbl, likert_max_lbl, reg_id, mdfcn_id ) VALUES ( #{srvyQitemOid}, #{srvyOid}, #{upSrvyQitemOid}, #{srvyQitemSeq}, #{srvyQitemTtl}, #{srvyQitemType}, #{esntlYn}, #{plrlChcYn}, #{lmtYn}, #{srvyQitemLmt}, #{etcAddYn}, #{likertMin}, #{likertMax}, #{likertMinLbl}, #{likertMaxLbl}, #{regId}, #{mdfcnId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE up_srvy_qitem_oid = #{upSrvyQitemOid}, srvy_qitem_seq = #{srvyQitemSeq}, srvy_qitem_ttl = #{srvyQitemTtl}, srvy_qitem_type = #{srvyQitemType}, esntl_yn = #{esntlYn}, plrl_chc_yn = #{plrlChcYn}, lmt_yn = #{lmtYn}, srvy_qitem_lmt = #{srvyQitemLmt}, etc_add_yn = #{etcAddYn}, likert_min = #{likertMin}, likert_max = #{likertMax}, likert_min_lbl = #{likertMinLbl}, likert_max_lbl = #{likertMaxLbl}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW()

/* upsertAdmin501SurveyOpt */ INSERT INTO ${schema}.srvy_qitem_opt ( srvy_qitem_opt_oid, srvy_qitem_oid, srvy_qitem_opt_seq, srvy_qitem_opt_txt, srvy_qitem_opt_img_file_oid, etc_opt_yn, reg_id, mdfcn_id ) VALUES ( #{srvyQitemOptOid}, #{srvyQitemOid}, #{srvyQitemOptSeq}, #{srvyQitemOptTxt}, #{srvyQitemOptImgFileOid}, #{etcOptYn}, #{regId}, #{mdfcnId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE srvy_qitem_oid = #{srvyQitemOid}, srvy_qitem_opt_seq = #{srvyQitemOptSeq}, srvy_qitem_opt_txt = #{srvyQitemOptTxt}, srvy_qitem_opt_img_file_oid = #{srvyQitemOptImgFileOid}, etc_opt_yn = #{etcOptYn}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW()
